body.p:
Unsorted snippets for the MarkLogic Console that may be helpful in various situations:
UWE test footnote (37/40, callout K): DITA fn maps to UWE footnote/key/desc.

dlentry.dt: "Rename" a document Rezept, wie man ein Dokument in MarkLogic "umbenennt"

dd.pre: xdmp:document-insert( $new-uri, fn:doc($old-uri), xdmp:document-get-permissions($old-uri), xdmp:document-get-collections($old-uri) ), xdmp:document-delete($old-uri), xdmp:document-set-properties($new-uri, $properties

dlentry.dt: Search for specific elements across different collections

dd.pre: for $element in cts:search(/descendant::*[self::b or self::i or self::u], cts:collection-query(("/topics", "/tasks", "/maps"))) return $element/text()

dlentry.dt: Get an element from a "stack" and remove it from the stack ("Pop")
Give me all documents that were added to the (temporal) collection "/topics" after 23.05.2019
cURL parameters to clear a DB (as array entries in the Python code)
Set basic permissions on documents; xdmp:document-update-permissions for updating
